title: Settings panel redesign — plate/subgroup grammar, toggle switches, RunPod key-gating
description:
Redesigned the whole Settings slide-over (impeccable skill, Variant C 'plates') so every section reads as one system.

SCOPE (6 files):
- js/components/Primitives/MpiCheckbox: added variant:'switch' (track+knob), same API/events. Reusable app-wide on/off affordance.
- js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiSettings (.js/.css): plate grammar for all prefs (label+desc left, control right, state-driven --on heat outline on active toggles); on/off checkboxes -> toggle switches via _mountSwitchPlate helper; Pixel mode -> segmented MpiRadioGroup; Reuse parts stay checkboxes, 'Ask each time' -> switch; External Connections reframed into titled __subgroup blocks (ComfyUI path / LoRA folders / Upscale folders); killed 2 double-labels; deleted ~110 lines dead CSS (__toggle/__checkbox-pill/__row/__header/__title/__desc/__extra-folders).
- js/components/Compounds/LandingPages/MpiRunpodSettings (.js/.css): 4 toggles -> switch plates; connect-flow reframed into ACCOUNT/STORAGE/MACHINE/Connect __subgroups; REMOVED side-stripe border (border-left:2px = impeccable absolute-ban); killed double-label.

BEHAVIOR CHANGE (user-approved): removed the 'Enable RunPod remote engine' toggle. RunPod controls now GATE on a saved API key (_applyEnabled derives from hasApiKey). ACCOUNT subgroup moved to top under the referral box, with the billing/responsibility disclaimer (rescued from the deleted Enable plate) + an 'unlock: save a read+write API key' prompt. _applyEnabled gates UI visibility + persists cfg.enabled (drop-recovery guard) but does NOT push remote-mode {active:true} — remote mode stays driven by actual Connect/Disconnect + the auto-connect-on-start boot path.

IN-SESSION REGRESSION FIXED (NOT changelogged — bug was introduced + fixed this same session, never shipped): an earlier iteration of _applyEnabled pushed /remote/mode {active:true} on key-save, so at boot with a saved key + no Pod, ensureServerRunning fell back to local and fired the 'No Pod connected — running locally' info toast every launch (+ 503 ws-token errors). Fix: _applyEnabled no longer pushes remote mode.

POLISH: referral promo box always stacks (button under copy) — a side-by-side row cramped text at the ~42vw panel width; Min System RAM row host width auto (was fixed 90px) so 'GB' hugs the input; hint line-height fixed via display:block (inline span was inheriting body{line-height:1.6} over .hint{1.5}; sheet-load-order let body win for a ce()-injected hint in MpiRunpodSettings).

VERIFIED: full panel driven live in the real Electron desktop app (screenshots), no console errors from these changes. RunPod body unlock path (key-save) is logic-verified + desktop-observed. New gotchas -> docs/ui-gotchas.md (hint display:block; minram host width).

attention.reason: Shipped + desktop-verified this session. Changelog: Settings redesign + RunPod key-gating are user-facing (proposed for UNRELEASED.md). The boot-toast fix is NOT changelogged (in-session regression, never shipped).
